purpose: Saudi man in white thobe seated on yellow geometric cube. Modern editorial.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Editorial fashion photography of Saudi man in late twenties wearing crisp white thobe with traditional collar, white ghutra and black iqal headwear, well-groomed short beard, seated on vivid {cube_color} geometric concrete cube against complementary solid colored backdrop, confident pose with one leg raised, real skin texture, modern editorial styling, shot on 85mm at f/4, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T34. Saudi adaptation guidance: Default thobe white. Fashion-forward brands can override to navy, beige, charcoal. Beard modern groomed not full-traditional. Reference image: Recommended. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month.
